local-mcp.description: Connect Claude Code to 160+ native macOS apps — Mail, Calendar, Contacts, Messages, Notes, Reminders, Finder, Safari, Teams, Slack, WhatsApp, OneDrive, Google Drive, Microsoft 365, Outlook, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and more. All tools run locally with no API keys or cloud data copies. Requires the free Local MCP tray app (local-mcp.com, macOS only).
